_schema: sector_relative_strength_history v1 — daily SECTOR RELATIVE STRENGTH readings from the Rotation Radar Bot. Each sector/group line is its % change vs the prior day's close (intraday relative-strength tape, NOT the cap-weighted 'sector score' in sector_heatmap_history.json). Unlike the heat map, this list mixes GICS sectors with breadth/style proxies (IWM small caps, SMH semis, XLK tech) and is ordered best→worst as the feed lists them. 'benchmark' is the SPY line. 's' is the feed's dot color: green=outperform/leading, gray=mid-pack, red=underperform/lagging. Append one object per reading; confirmed feed numbers only.
_rules: Only confirmed Rotation Radar Bot feed numbers. Append-only; never edit or delete committed rows. Copy percentages exactly. Record ts=null when the post shows no UTC timestamp — never guess one. Omit a line the feed didn't show rather than back-filling.
